post.content:
Applied to UBER through a referral. Call came after a month and Interview was scheduled in a week.

**Coding Round 1** - [Bus Routes ](https://leetcode.com/problems/bus-routes/)
Had solved this question before, so was able to finish this in 40 minutes, so the interviewer asked a follow-up with weights added on the routes.

**Coding Round 2** - [Quad_Tree]
It was related to an implementation of quad tree and create quad tree question at LC.

The feedback was positive and then second sets of interviews were scheduled.

**Design Round 1** - Design discussion on a previous project (HLD)

**Design Round 2** - Design discussion on a previous project (LLD + HLD) [discussion was on different components used]
							 LSM Trees


The feedback was positive and then second sets of interviews were scheduled.

**Hiring Manager** - Behavioural Questions, different than usual (e.g. - Tell me about a time when u were not able to resolve a conflict)

**Bar Raiser** - Was split into two sections:
			*design* - Was asked to design whatsapp (with DM, Group Messages and Read Reciepts)
			*Behavioural Questions* - With focus on process improvement, interviewing other candidates and improving efficiency.


Link to the compensation details - https://leetcode.com/discuss/compensation/1591265/UBER-or-SSE-(5A)-or-Hyderabad
There is no machine coding round for SSE role ?
Is it focussed towards Backend roles?
